_metadata.name: Supply Chain Takeover Precursor Hunt
_metadata.description: Dependency-security workflow that checks npm package specs against OSV, fetches npm registry metadata, flags takeover precursors (malicious advisories, install scripts, typosquat signals), and writes CNA/GHSA-ready precursor briefs.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Supply Chain Takeover Precursor Hunt
manifest.description: Find npm supply-chain takeover precursors using OSV advisories and npm registry metadata heuristics.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Supply Chain Takeover Precursor Hunt
graph.description: npm OSV plus registry metadata precursor hunt for ecosystem CVE/GHSA reporting.

runtimeInputs.label: npm package specs
runtimeInputs.description: Package names with optional versions, for example lodash@4.17.20 or @scope/pkg@1.0.0.

runtimeInputs.label: Research notes
runtimeInputs.description: Optional program or triage context to include in the report.

runtimeInputs.label: Typosquat comparison names
runtimeInputs.description: Optional trusted package names to compare against for typosquat precursor heuristics.

data.label: Fetch Registry Metadata and Rank Precursors
